expect.note: The repo has ~24 real test files under tests/ (test_*.py) plus example suites under examples/tutorial/tests and examples/javascript/tests (excluded by gazelle directive). Tier-3 asserts gazelle generated native py_test targets for the root tests/ tree. Type_check/ files are not pytest tests; test_apps/ are fixtures, not tests.

Flask's tests rely on shared conftest fixtures, data deps (templates/static/sql), and fixture apps with deliberately shadowing modules (test_apps/cliapp/inner1/inner2/flask.py). Passing under Bazel requires correct data deps, pip-resolved native wheels (markupsafe), and conftest wiring; full green is uncertain, so this is informational. A non-passing tier-4 still leaves an honest tier-3 (native tests discovered) as the earned result.
